description: This is a Flask-based web app designed to help users create SEO-optimized YouTube titles and descriptions effortlessly. Users simply describe their video and customize their title settings, such as character and word limits, SEO optimization, tone, and whether to include emojis. Based on these preferences, the app generates multiple title suggestions.Along with the title, the app also provides a suggested video description to match, but users can further customize it by setting their own preferences to generate a personalized description. This makes it easier to craft engaging and optimized video content.Tech Stack:  Programming Language: Python, Web Framework: Flask, Frontend: HTML, CSS, BOOTSTRAP, JS,  LLM: OPENAI API KEY.
tagline: Create SEO-optimized titles and descriptions for your videos.

project title: AI HealthMate - Personalized Diet & Medical Insight Assistant
description: A Flask-based AI-powered web and mobile app designed to help users maintain a healthy lifestyle through AI-powered diet, fitness, and medical insights. Users can generate personalized diet plans based on their health conditions and receive recommended exercise videos tailored to their needs.The app also includes a diet analyzer, where users can upload meal images to check if their food aligns with their health requirements. A built-in AI chatbot assists with diet-related queries, suggests healthy alternatives, and provides personalized nutrition advice.Additionally, users can analyze their medical reports with a fine-tuned AI model, receiving detailed health recommendations. With a seamless user experience across both web and mobile, AI this app provides a comprehensive and intelligent approach to health management making fitness, nutrition, and medical tracking effortless  . With secure authentication and an admin dashboard for easy management.Tech Stack: Programming Language: Python, Web Framework: Flask, Frontend: HTML, CSS, BOOTSTRAP, JS,  AI&LLM: Gemini 2.0 Flash API KEY, Authentication: Secure Authentication, Admin Dashboard: Management Panel for User & Data Control
tagline: Your Smart Companion for Diet, Fitness, and Health Insights!

project title: Career Path Recommender - Find Your Ideal Learning Journey
description: A Flask-based web app designed to help students and learners choose the right career path. Users can enter their current skill level and their goal, and the system identifies the gap between them. Based on this gap, the app recommends multiple courses along with a structured roadmap to help them achieve their target.Additionally, for those with no prior skills, the system provides a step-by-step learning path to guide them from scratch to expertise in their chosen field. This makes career planning easier and more structured for learners.Tech Stack:Programming Language: Python, Web Framework: Flask, Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, AI & LLM: OPENAI GPT4o-mini, Vectorizer: TFIDF vectorizer

Creating a professional invoice can feel overwhelming—especially for those with little to no design or formatting experience. That’s exactly what inspired me to build this AI-powered invoice generator using Flask, which makes the whole process smooth and intuitive.

Whether the user speaks their requirements or types them, the app listens (via Whisper for speech-to-text) or reads, and then smartly extracts all the necessary invoice details using Gemini 2.0. It even detects missing fields and adds placeholders so the user can quickly fill in or adjust the data. A clean, editable form is presented for review and changes—once finalized, a polished, professional PDF invoice is generated using ReportLab.

What makes this tool special is how effortlessly it empowers someone with zero design or technical skills to generate a fully formatted invoice. In just a few minutes, with nothing more than raw input—voice or text—they get a document that looks like it was made by a pro.  Built with: Flask, Python, HTML, CSS, JS, Bootstrap, OpenAI Whisper, Hugging Face, Gemini Flash, ReportLab.
tagline: Generate Invoices with Just Your Voice or Text

project title: Real Estate Lead Engagement & Qualification System
description:
Overview

A smart AI-powered lead engagement and qualification system built specifically for real estate agencies. Integrated directly into a website as a chatbot, it automatically engages every visitor, asks the right questions, and qualifies them — so agents only spend time on leads that actually matter.

How It Works

  1. Visitor lands on the real estate website
  2. AI chatbot instantly engages them in a natural conversation
  3. System asks qualifying questions — budget, timeline, property type, location preference
  4. Based on responses, visitor is classified as Hot, Warm, or Cold lead
  5. Real estate agent receives instant notification with full lead details and classification

Key Features

  • 24/7 automated lead engagement — no human needed to start the conversation
  • Intelligent qualification flow built on Make.com automation
  • Hot, Warm, Cold lead classification sent directly to the agent
  • Seamless chatbot integration on any real estate website
  • Zero leads slip through — every visitor is engaged automatically

Why Real Estate Agencies Need This

Most agencies lose potential clients simply because no one responds fast enough. This system engages every visitor the moment they land — qualifying them instantly and delivering only the most promising leads to agents. It saves hours of manual follow-up and ensures no opportunity is missed.

What's Coming Next

This is Version 1. Advanced features are in development — including deeper CRM integration, multilingual support, and predictive lead scoring using AI.

Tech Stack

  • Make.com — automation and qualification workflow
  • AI Chatbot — website integration and conversation handling
  • Webhook-based lead delivery to agent
tagline: Turning Every Website Visitor into a Qualified Lead
techTags: Make.com, AI Chatbot, Automation, Lead Qualification, Real Estate, Website Integration
